description: Capability for the breaks quick-select window (the break-rules dashboard). It only invokes app-defined commands (cmd_get_rules / cmd_set_rule_flags / cmd_close_breaks / cmd_open_settings / cmd_reload_window / cmd_window_ready), which are not capability-gated. Those commands are restricted to this window by the require_breaks() caller-check in src/commands.rs. core:event:allow-listen is granted so it can listen for the locale-reload broadcast (src/locale-reload.ts).
